pmodel PhiEquationsTestN1 {
    local phi: matrix(real,3,3)
    
    local B_k: matrix(real,4,4)
    
    local link Link1 {
        def {
            const number: nat = 1
            local B_1: matrix(real,4,4)
            local V_1: vector(real,6)
            local alpha_1: vector(real,6)
        }
        local body Body1 {
            def {
                inertial {
                    mass: 1.0
                    inertia {
                        ixx: 0.1
                        ixy: 0.0
                        ixz: 0.0
                        iyy: 0.1
                        iyz: 0.0
                        izz: 0.1
                    }
                    pose {
                        x: 0.0
                        y: 0.0
                        z: 0.0
                        roll: 0.0
                        pitch: 0.0
                        yaw: 0.0
                    }
                }
                box(length=0.1, width=0.1, height=0.1)
            }
        }
    }
    
    equations {
        submatrix(phi)(0,0,3,3) == identity(3)
    }
}
